subject: Follow-Up on Feature Delivery Commitment
body_paragraphs: I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to address a concern regarding a specific feature delivery commitment that was discussed with you during our last conversation. It appears that this commitment has not yet been documented in our CRM system, which may lead to confusion about its status and timeline.

To ensure we are aligned and can meet your expectations, I recommend we formally log this commitment and establish a clear timeline for its delivery. This will help us track progress effectively and keep you informed throughout the process. Please let me know a convenient time for us to discuss this further and finalize the details.
